chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision No. S – 138 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For orders on CMA No.536/2024 (U/A) 04.03.2024 Mr. Ch. Shahid Hussain Rajput, Advocate for applicants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Urgency is granted. Applicants No.1(c) Imran Ali, Attorney of remaining applicants and respondent No.1(b) / 2 Zahid Mehmood Aslam, attorney of remaining private respondents are present. M/s Mian Abdul Salam Arain and Rana Muhammad Umar Rajput, Advocates have filed power on behalf of respondents. Parties have filed an application under Order XXIII Rule 3 CPC read with Section 151 CPC seeking disposal of this revision application in the light of terms and conditions on the basis of which they have compromised with each other. The terms and conditions are duly mentioned in the application. Office to assign CMA number to this application. With consent of all the parties present, who have filed relevant affidavits in support of the application filed today admitting its contents as true, this civil revision is disposed of along with pending application(s), if any, in the light of terms and conditions contained in the application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
